ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., casual, sick) */,
  "applied_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leave was applied */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the leave request */,
  "leave_address" TEXT /* Address where the employee will be during leave */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Current processing status of the leave request */,
  "replacing_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replacing user, if applicable */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user applying for leave */,
  "leaveto" TEXT /* Designation of the person approving the leave */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the leave request */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the leave request */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leave request was last updated */,
  "leave_policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a specific leave policy */,
  "leave_duration" INTEGER /* Number of days of leave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_leave_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_policy_id") REFERENCES leave_policies ("leave_policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_leave_type FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager, HR) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_types" (
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave type */,
  "leave_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave type (e.g., casual, sick) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leave type */,
  "leave_duration_type" TEXT /* Type of leave duration (e.g., days, hours, weeks) */,
  "leave_policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a specific leave policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave balance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID to whom the balance pertains */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leave type */,
  "available_days" INTEGER /* Number of available leave days */,
  "carry_forward" INTEGER /* Number of days that can be carried forward to the next year */,
  "leave_balance_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the leave balance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balances_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the department manager */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* Parent department ID (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the leave request being acted upon */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_leave_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("leave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., leave balance alert threshold) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., leave, notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_policies" (
  "leave_policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave policy */,
  "leave_policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the leave policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_policy_id")
)
